summary: Solid FOB audience recording of a mellow, slow show that shines thanks to an outstanding Bird Song.
review: The tape captures a decent front‑of‑house audience mix that many reviewers consider the better source for this concert. Musically the performance is mixed – a generally relaxed set with Jerry tired and a sluggish vibe, but Phil’s driving middle on Bird Song (and a happy LSD encore) provide the high points.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is mixed (average ~3.7) while recording quality is rated good to excellent (~4.5); weighted combination yields a near‑4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Solid front‑of‑house audience capture; clearer and more balanced than the alternative source, though typical ambient crowd noise is present.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A mellow first set that drifts slowly, with a few highlights (Bird Song, the LSD encore) and limited high‑energy jamming; second set contains only modest jams.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Appears tired; his Crazy Fingers solo is said to sap energy from the set.
band_member_comments.Phil: Delivers an outstanding middle section on Bird Song, rescuing a otherwise slow first set.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drumz are noted but not singled out for special praise.
